summary: Dashboard cards ARE rendering correctly. The 'View Report' CTAs ARE present in the DOM. The regression is NOT a frontend rendering failure — it is a deployment artifact failure (missing HTML files behind the URLs).

architecture_verification.card_renderer: js/card_renderer.js (hand-authored, PROTECTED_FILES, never overwritten by pipeline)
architecture_verification.api_adapter: js/api_adapter.js (hand-authored, PROTECTED_FILES, never overwritten by pipeline)

report_url_injection_audit.customer_experience: Card renders with View Report button → click → HTTP 404

cta_hardening_fix.description: FAIL PIPELINE if report_url path is missing (Stage 5.4.1 hard fail). validate_reports.py Rule 3b independently checks public report_url path. Prevents broken CTA deployment.
cta_hardening_fix.mandate: Pipeline MUST NOT deploy to Pages unless ALL manifest report_url paths exist on disk
